verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm searching for salvation once again Living in this world Full of wickedness and guilt My life has ruined by the cares of this world.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I gave myself, my whole life to you There's nothing in this life compares with you I love you, I want you and I need you Your words are your promises I stand.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Restoring my heart Restoring my altar Restoring my faith that lost again I give you my heart I give you my soul that was broken

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For you are my peace You are my hope You are the love inside of me You are my joy You are my everything to me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Nothing can separate us from the love of God For you are my altar My everything to me.
